overview: AltInstinct — a Gen Z emotional streetwear brand with mood-based product discovery, cinematic lookbook reels, and lore drop countdowns.
features: Mood-based emotional filter (Chaos, Isolation, Obsession, Escape, Overthinking, Burnout) on product pages
Cinematic lookbook reel gallery on Homepage with one reel per collection series
Lore drop countdown timer on Homepage with admin-configurable target date
SIGNAL and STATIC dual theme modes across all pages
Full e-commerce: email login, guest cart, Stripe checkout, wishlist, admin panel
